programme.desc: When the team and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital, a deadly fungus outbreak occurs, forcing everyone into quarantine.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The members of the team go under cover at a university in order to track a hacker who is putting the world economy at risk.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop a catastrophe on Christmas Eve when heavy rain creates a large crack in a dam, putting an entire town in danger.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The members of Team Scorpion brave subzero temperatures in Antarctica to save a United States Special Forces unit; Toby risks his life to save Happy.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Sylvester's father, a retired general, asks the team for help when he thinks a dictator in Africa has uncovered weapons of mass destruction from World War II.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The members of Team Scorpion are asked to help NASA with a top-secret rocket launch, but they must sabotage their own mission when Walter's date finds a bomb strapped to her chest.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When a powerful earthquake hits Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must prevent a pinched gas line from causing a massive explosion.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop an influx of drugs that are being smuggled into the country via drones; an ultimatum is issued.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: Fast-talking diamond dealer Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) and his wife, Sarah (Nicole Kidman), live the good life in a beautiful home surrounded by thick woods. Their dream life turns into a nightmare when violent thieves, led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn), invade their home disguised as police officers. With Kyle and Sarah now frightened captives, Kyle knows he must use every negotiating trick in his book, for once Elias and his men get what they want, the Millers will likely be killed.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Set in North Carolina, "A Walk To Remember" follows the rite of passage of a jaded, aimless high school senior (Shane West) who falls in love with a guileless young woman (Mandy Moore) he and his friends once scorned. The two develop a powerful and inspirational relationship in which they discover truths that take most people a lifetime to learn.

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: Pregnant Emily bonds quickly with her pregnant neighbor Kelly, but Kelly is faking it and plans to steal Emily's baby.

programme.title: Season Of The Witch
programme.desc: 14th-century knights transport a suspected witch to a monastery, where monks deduce that her powers.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Bay City, down on his luck detective is hired to find the ex-lover of a glamorous heiress.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: The Marksman
programme.desc: A rancher on the Arizona border becomes the unlikely defender of a young Mexican boy desperately fleeing the cartel assassins who've pursued him into the U.S.

programme.title: Places In The Heart
programme.desc: In depression America, hardship was everywhere, survival was a struggle, and hope was hidden in places in the heart.

programme.title: Brian's Song
programme.desc: The story of professional football players Gale Sayers and Brian Piccolo, and how their friendship on and off the field was affected when Piccolo contracted a fatal disease.

programme.title: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Sent to spend the summer with their uncle on a remote island, young brothers Andy and Mark learn that their eccentric grandfather once owned the island, but vanished without a trace…taking with him the secret to a vast fortune. Delving into the mysterious past of the island, the brothers discover that their grandfather designed a complex treasure hunt, a hunt that could lead to unimaginable wealth and heal their broken family – if they can find it in time. Sinister forces also search for the money and will stop at nothing to keep the boys from their quest. As the adventure unfolds, the boys learn that the bonds of family are the most valuable riches of all, and that some family secrets can t stay buried forever.

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: Overworked executive Bob Munroe persuades his wife and children to give up their Hawaiian vacation for some "family bonding" on a cross-country RV trip. But it s all a ruse. Bob has other, more career-oriented reasons on his mind than spending quality time with his family in the Rocky Mountains. Through a series of misadventures, including constant run-ins with an overly friendly troupe of full-time RV ers, Bob inadvertently learns the true meaning of family.

programme.title: How To Save A Marriage (And Ruin Your Life)
programme.desc: To save his best friend's marriage, a lawyer seduces the man's mistress, not realizing he's wooing the wrong woman.

programme.title: You Can't Take It With You
programme.desc: Lionel Barrymore is the eccentric patriarch of a clan of frustrated artists who decided 30 years earlier to retire from the rat race and use his fortune to encourage friends and family to pursue vocations that really interest them. At the center of his family is his granddaughter, Jean Arthur, who is carrying on a romance with her boss son, James Stewart.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: Allied commandos are dispatched deep inside the Burmese jungle to blow up a strategic bridge built by British POWs.

programme.title: Knight Of Cups
programme.desc: A writer indulging in all that Los Angeles and Las Vegas have to offer, undertakes a search for love and self via a series of adventures with six different women.

programme.title: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: A rich car dealer is losing his mind. His son lives in the bomb shelter. His suicidal wife has an affair with his transvestite sales manager.

programme.title: Georgia Rule
programme.desc: A troubled young woman is sent to live with her grandmother for the summer, while hiding a secret that could potentially tear her family apart.

programme.title: Tie Me Up! Tie Me Down!
programme.desc: An unbalanced but alluring former mental patient takes a porn star prisoner in the hopes of convincing her to marry him.

programme.title: Paris Is Burning
programme.desc: A chronicle of New York's drag scene in the 1980s, focusing on balls, voguing and the ambitions and dreams of those who gave the era its warmth and vitality.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: Two detectives are drawn into a mysterious case where a thief has masterminded a series of bank heists.
A naïve young man assumes a dead man’s identity in order to join an underworld game of Russian roulette.

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: Frank Martin is forced to deliver the kidnapped daughter of a Ukrainian official from Marseilles to Odessa.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A fighter struggling to deal with a tragic loss rescues a Chinese girl being targeted by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: A damaged ex-special forces soldier seizes an opportunity to assume another man's identity.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: A Legend
programme.desc: An archeologist notices that the texture of the relics discovered during the excavation of a glacier closely resembles a jade pendant seen in one of his dreams. He and his team then embark on an expedition into the depths of the glacier.

programme.title: Broken Sword Hero
programme.desc: A young runaway grows into a legendary fighter in the combat sport of Muay Thai.

programme.title: The Grandmaster of Kungfu
programme.desc: In the late Qing Dynasty, Grandmaster Huo Yuan Jia leads Tianjin martial artists in defense of the country against Japanese invaders.

programme.title: The Rise of Hero
programme.desc: Huang Feihong wants to make a living in Guangzhou. With the help of Zhou Shisan and Lu Yibai, he is finally allowed to take an exam in Guangzhou, and he may be able to study abroad. But after he gets there, he discovers a conspiracy among city leaders and the conservatives in the court led by Eunuch Hai, who wants to end the Studying Abroad Campaign launched by the Westernization Movement.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: After a shocking betrayal by his sworn brother, a general (Andy Lau) takes refuge at a Shaolin temple and learns martial arts from a crazy cook (Jackie Chan).

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: Lindsay and Will bond after agreeing the dating service that matched them has made a mistake.

programme.title: Out Of Reach
programme.desc: A woman struggles to cut ties between her family and her husband's powerful new friends before it's too late.

programme.title: WWJD2 The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled teenage boy helps an aging wood carver finish an impossibly difficult job.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Beth is wrongly accused of murdering her husband, Paul. Even her step-daughter does not believe her.

programme.title: A Mother's Sacrifice
programme.desc: A mother fear that her daughter has been abducted when a phone call is interrupted by something suspicious.

programme.title: Animal 2
programme.desc: James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) took the fall for the crimes of his older son (Vicellous Shannon) and is now serving a life term at Folsom Prison. When his younger son, James Jr. (K.C. Collins), is framed for murder, Allen refuses to let two men from the same family submit to life imprisonment for crimes they didn't commit. When he learns that James Jr. was set up by someone at the prison, he resolves to win his son's freedom. To do this, he must return to his violent brawler roots.

programme.title: Mafia
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a fierce crime boss (Ving Rhames) wreaks havoc across the streets, and it's up to hardened detective James Womack (Pam Grier) and her partner Dupree (Robert Patrick) to put an end to organized crime - even if it means breaking the law.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: The New Girl
programme.desc: When her sister Monica suddenly disappears under suspicious circumstances, Malorie becomes convinced that Monica’s seemingly perfect husband is hiding something sinister. She then launches her own investigation and unearths a twisted web of lies, abuse, and even political conspiracy. Malorie must confront dangerous secrets that not only threaten her sister’s life but her own.

programme.title: Reality TV Murders
programme.desc: In the world of reality TV, Chasity Safire is a household name and has been the star of the hugely popular reality TV show “Diva’s Doing it” for the past 5 years. When one of the castmates is found dead, the women become suspects and we discover that some of the women would literally kill to be famous.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: After the murder of his fiancée and her lover, Cameron escapes Atlanta under a new identity and loses the trail of the investigators. When he meets Lauren after settling in Florida, his cover begins to crack when a neighbor begins asking questions, and opening secrets that are supposed to be buried.

programme.title: Don Dada
programme.desc: Desperate to survive a brutal Chicago winter, Rah Jah and Tee Tee hustle for food and shelter in the streets. When a botched deal lands him in the hands of powerful crime bosses, he rises to the top of the hierarchy at a deadly cost.

programme.title: Rhythm and Revenge
programme.desc: After losing her parents, Journi, a talented but troubled teenager, moves in with her aunt and cousin for a fresh start. As she navigates the pressures of competitive dance, strange accidents begin to occur around her. Suspicion grows, but Journi always seems one step ahead, charming her way out of trouble. However, when the truth starts to unravel, danger lurks closer than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Troy: The Odyssey
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Trojan War, Odysseus must battle gods and monsters as he journeys home.

programme.title: Universal Soldiers
programme.desc: Unstable and unstoppable genetically modified super soldiers escape from their maximum security holding cells.

programme.title: San Andreas Quake
programme.desc: A discredited seismologist warns of an impending 12.7 earthquake and races to get her family to safety.

programme.title: Megaboa
programme.desc: College students look for cave drawings in Columbia, but find a once-extinct and deadly 50-foot boa constrictor.

programme.title: Mercenaries
programme.desc: A team of female commandos is assembled to infiltrate a high-security women's prison and rescue a dignitary.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and Our Heroes must stop Zona from launching operation "Black Rainbow."

programme.title: Slumber Party Massacre II (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Courtney Bates, the younger sister of Valerie, and her friends go to their condo for a weekend getaway, but Courtney can't get rid of the haunting feeling that a supernatural rockabilly driller killer is coming to murder them all.

programme.title: Hatchet III
programme.desc: In the epic third installment of Adam Greens slasher franchise, Marybeth (Danielle Harris, Halloween) uncovers the true secret to stopping the voodoo curse that has left the ghost of deformed maniac Victor Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday the 13th) stalking the New Orleans bayou for decades. An entire police department, paramedic response team, and heavily armed S.W.A.T. unit face off with the iconic monster in this action-packed and explosive horror comedy. Hatchet III is full of stunts and jaw dropping gore effects that raise both the bar and the body count of the previous two films put together. Also starring genre favorites Zach Galligan (Gremlins), Caroline Williams (Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2), and Derek Mears (Friday the 13th 2009 and Predators).

programme.title: Hatchet II: Unrated (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Victor Crowley lives in this follow-up to Adams Greens Hatchet. The quiet but hot-tempered heroine Marybeth (Danielle Harris, Halloween) barely escapes from the clutches of the mysterious Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday The 13th), who has already has murdered all of Marybeths friends and other vacationers in the New Orleans swamp country. Marybeth recruits a team of hired guns and returns to the bayou to exact her revenge, but quickly discovers that even with an army of hunters at her side, the murderous fury of Crowley cannot be contained. Ultimately, it will be up to Marybeth alone to defeat the seemingly indestructible Crowley, but not before learning the truth about a twisted secret he shares with her own family!Filled with buckets of giddily over-the-top blood 'n' guts (The Hollywood Reporter), not to mention a funky, frisky sense of humor (The Onion AV Club), the unrated Hatchet II serves up a ferocious and furious dose of splatterific entertainment.just like in old days!

programme.title: Silent Madness (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A criminally insane man is accidentally released from a mental hospital. The staff tries to cover it up, but a young psychiatrist travels to the college town where he committed several murders to warn the locals and anticipate his arrival.

programme.title: Victor Crowley (Edited Version)
programme.desc: In 2007, over forty people were brutally torn to pieces in Louisianas Honey Island Swamp. Over the past decade, lone survivor Andrews (Parry Shen) claims that local legend Victor Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday the 13th series) was responsible for the horrific massacre have been met with great controversy. But when a twist of fate puts him back at the scene of the tragedy, Crowley is mistakenly resurrected and Andrew must face the bloodthirsty ghost from his past. Featuring Laura Ortiz (The Hills Have Eyes), Dave Sheridan (Scary Movie), and Brian Quinn (truTVs Impractical Jokers), writer/director Adam Greens triumphant return to the directors chair proudly assures an all-new, horrifying journey into the haunted, blood-drenched bayou.

programme.title: Sissy
programme.desc: Invited away on a hen's weekend, Sissy is stuck in a remote cabin with her high school bully...and a taste for revenge. #triggered

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve
programme.desc: A babysitter finds a VHS tape which features various sinister murders performed by a psychotic clown.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve 2
programme.desc: A woman finds a VHS tape that shows a series of gruesome tales that could be real. But the true danger is the pumpkin-faced killer that's using the tape to find his next victim.

programme.title: Host
programme.desc: Six friends hire a medium to conduct a séance during lockdown for their weekly Zoom call. Jemma decides to pull a prank and makes up a story about a boy she knew in high school who hung himself. By doing this, Jemma inadvertently invites a demonic presence to cross over. Soon the friends begin noticing strange occurrences in their homes as the evil spirit begins to make itself known, and they all realize this night may be their last.

programme.title: Found Footage 3D
programme.desc: Six filmmakers set out to make 'the first 3D found-footage horror movie', but find themselves IN a found-footage horror movie when the evil entity from their film escapes into their footage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Lafe Lingers On" - Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Giant Jackrabbit" - Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone

programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone (Bruce Bennett) battles Shawnee warriors as he leads a band of settlers into Kentucky in this frontier potboiler from Albert C. Gannaway Productions. Made at the height of Hollywood's fascination with pioneer days, the film also stars Lon Chaney Jr. as Chief Blackfish, and country singer Faron Young as a handsome young suitor for Boone's daughter. There's plenty of action and danger here as the Shawnee are convinced that Boone is trying to steal their land. But Boone is ready, not even fearing death by tomahawk. It isn't how you die, Boone says. It's what you live for.

programme.title: The Kansan
programme.desc: Richard Dix stars in this epic of the boisterous and brawling Old West! Wounded in a gun battle with the notorious James gang, John Bonniwell (Dix) wakes up in the hospital to find out hes been elected marshal! He quickly learns that this hot-headed frontier town can only be cooled off with blazing lead and dynamite! Jane Wyatt, Albert Dekker, Victor Jory, and Robert Armstrong also star in this tale of smashing fists and crashing bullets from director George Archainbaud (The Lost Squadron).

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: He Dared Death In The Outlaw's Lair! John Travers (John Wayne) takes on a mysterious gang leader known as The Shadow in this vintage western from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Director/writer Robert N. Bradbury (Blue Steel, Riders of Destiny) gets the best of a remarkable cast that includes George Gabby Hayes. Of interest to film buffs is that the feature was shot in various California locations by Oscar winning cinematographer Archie Stout (The Quiet Man).

programme.title: Riders of Destiny
programme.desc: John Wayne sings! Well, not really. His voice was dubbed here, but as Singin Sandy Saunders hes still able to write the code of justice with a blazing sixgun! Hes a government agent out to help a group of ranchers in their battle with a villain who is tying up local water rights. Also starring Gabby Hayes, Al St. John, Yakima Canutt, and Cecilia Parker, Riders of Destiny was filmed early in Waynes career it was his first for Lone Star but the unmistakable swagger is already in place!

programme.title: Man from Utah
programme.desc: WHIRLING ROPES AND SNARLING GUNS IN THE GALLOPING GRIP OF A GLAMOROUS DRAMA! John Wayne stars as John Weston, a man hired to investigate shady doings at a local rodeo. It seems all the riders who are on the verge of winning end up dead. Along with Wayne, this tale of action on the range also stars the usual Lone Star Picture stock company, including Gabby Hayes and Yakima Canutt!

programme.title: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Billy the Kid, Pat Garrett, and Doc Holliday ride again in Howard Hughes' epic 1943 western, but the character you'll remember most is sultry country vixen Rio McDonald. Hughes' nationwide search for an actress to play Rio resulted in the film debut of Jane Russell, whose natural assets were allegedly helped by a special bra designed by Hughes. When The Outlaw finally received a nationwide release in 1946, its success vindicated Hughes and made Russell a star. As for Hughes' infamous bra, Russell said in her 1988 memoir, I never wore it, and he never knew.

programme.title: Driving Sharkwerks' Porsche Cayman GT4

programme.title: Driving Audi's 1000bhp R18 LMP1 race car

programme.title: Spa-Francorchamps. Eau Rouge. Flat out…?

programme.title: PREVIEW: Renault Alpine A110, the Porsche Cayman rival
programme.desc: Renault has revived the Alpine brand to give us the new A110, a 247bhp sports car that's over 300kg lighter than a Porsche Cayman S. Will it be as iconic as the 1960s two-seater with which it shares its name? Over to Chris Chilton to find out.

programme.title: PREVIEW: Porsche 911 GT3 – 493bhp 4.0-litre and a manual 'box
programme.desc: The 991.2 Porsche 911 GT3 is here! There's a new 493bhp 4.0-litre flat-six engine, the option of the six-speed manual gearbox from the limited-edition 911 R, and lots more besides. Settle down as Andreas Preuninger, Porsche GT Project Director, guides DRIVETRIBE's Features Editor Henry Catchpole around the latest Porsche 911 GT3…

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit the coast of North Carolina where host Ryan McVinney meets up with filmmaker Jonas Pate and his family to discuss the real life inspiration behind his hit Netflix show Outer Banks. We learn about Carolina Skiffs and visit Grady-White in Greenville, then meet some professional boat cinematographers and local custom Carolina sport fishing yacht dealers. Finally we stop in Washington to reminisce about the early days of powerboat racing with champion Reggie Fountain, who regales viewers with tales of beating Don Johnson, Kurt Russell, Al Copeland and Chuck Norris while setting speed records and capturing the title of the fastest V-bottom boat in the world. From go-fast speed boats to family cruising we see some of what makes North Carolina’s storied boating culture unique and special.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: Podcast Producer Sasha Ashall, the maestro behind the soothing sounds of the hit podcasts The Dave Chang Show and Recipe Club sits on the other side of the table for a change, as Dave cooks for Sasha.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: Dave and Chris Ying work through some of the weeks failures and successes, and works on refining the approach to the show going forward.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Caesar Salad & Fettuccini Alfredo: Chris and Andrew cook two inviting recipes from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Creamy fettuccine Alfredo and a Caesar salad packed with umami. These classics are a comforting and exceptional balance of heavy and light that will put you at ease.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Pan Roasted Salmon with Caper Butter Sauce, Green Beans & Potato Rösti - Andrew prepares another delicious meal from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Pan roasted, dry aged salmon with a caper butter sauce, and a buttery potato rösti, basically a fancy-sounding Swiss-German term for hash browns.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Clam Chowder & Spaghetti with Clams - Andrew prepares two recipes from Dinner Time Live: A clam chowder so cozy and good that New Englanders would approve, and Spaghetti with Clams—a simple and delicious pasta dish.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Lemongrass Beef Skewers, Bánh Mì Tea Sandwiches, Spicy Beef Stew - Chris and Andrew make three different dishes from the Seven Courses of Beef episode of Dinner Time Live, including an interpretation of Vietnamese Bo Kho (a spicy beef stew) and Bánh Mì reimagined as a dainty tea sandwich.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Pumpkin Spiced Beef Curry & Popcorn Soup - Chris and Andrew make a delicious pumpkin spice beef curry, based on the dish David Chang made for his guests during the Pumpkin Spice episode of Dinner Time Live. Rather than using duck confit, the guys decided to make it more practical for the home chef by using a big 'ol chuck roast.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Ratatouille Tarte Tatin" - Chris Ying creates a beautiful ratatouille tarte Tatin, motivated by a combination of online influences, including an on-the-fly challenge from his buddy David Chang while they were making chicken pot pie together in a different video. Chris riffs on the popular trend zipping around social media to make tarte Tatin (typically a sweet pastry) while paying homage to recipe YouTuber extraordinaire, Andrew Rea (Binging with Babish), who's first mega-popular video was recreating the ratatouille from...Ratatouille.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "WTF is BORG and Can a Mixologist Make it Good?" - Professional bartender, mixologist and author, John deBary, joins Chris Ying to figure out why all the college kids are going bonkers over a viral drink trend called BORG (Black Out Rage Gallon). Yikes! Is it any good? Are the kids maybe onto something here? Can John come up with a recipe that elevates it from the bottom shelf to...a slightly higher shelf? We feel old.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "McDonald's General Tso's Chicken" - Chris Ying has seen all of the McDonald's "hacks" that are floating around social media, and he's calling BS. Most of these don't even qualify as actual hacks, so he takes matters into his own hands and concocts a clever dish using Chicken McNuggets, Sweet & Sour sauce, ketchup, (and a few other things you'd have in your kitchen) to truly upgrade your McDonald's meal.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Chris Makes Beef & Broccoli" - Who doesn't love broccoli beef (other than vegetarians)??? Lucky for you, Chris Ying woke up with a craving for THAT EXACT DISH. Here he shows you how to make his dead simple version (using the microwave to speed things up). This is some high-quality weeknight cooking, people! Make it for yourself and let us know what you think.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking School - David Chang Makes 5 Easy Recipes Using His New Korean BBQ Sauces: David Chang shows off some of his favorite ways to use his new Momofuku Korean BBQ Sauces, including a vinaigrette salad dressing that he makes two different salads for, a simple beef & broccoli recipe, Dakdoritang (spicy chicken stew), Gamja Jorim (Korean braised potatoes), and a deliciously easy steak sauce.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Invitation to a Banquet: A Conversation with Fuchsia Dunlop" - Step into the vibrant world of Chinese cuisine with acclaimed author and culinary adventurer, Fuchsia Dunlop, as she unveils the flavors and stories behind her latest book, "Invitation to a Banquet." Dunlop stops by the Majordomo Media studio to chat with Chris Ying to discuss her lastest literary achivement and some perspectives from her 30+ years of studying Sichuan food and Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: With Athens as a backdrop, Diane explores the foods that so many of us have in common regardless of where we are from. Can soba noodles be grecophied? Can a classic spanakopita be a filling for an American baked potato? Diane answers these questions and ventures beyond tradition into the global world, embracing new ingredients, and christens new recipes.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Densely forested mountains, stone-cobbled villages, sheep, and greenery are the stuff of Epirus's mountainous terrain. Diane visits a traditional shepherding family and makes a feta cheese pie baked the way it's been done for centuries: over embers. At home, Diane makes two of her own pies: a Pleated, Buttery Feta Cheese Pie and a Chicken-Phyllo Pie, both inspired by this region.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a daughter of a Holocaust survivor for a tour of Thessaloniki's Jewish past and cook up Sephardic recipes, including Huevos Haminados (slow boiled spiced eggs) and Merenza Assada (grilled eggplant with meatballs in tomato sauce). Diane learns about Keftikas de Nogada (meatballs in walnut sauce) and at home, makes Chicken with Prunes.

programme.title: Serial Griller
programme.desc: In “All the Courses,” Matt Moore celebrates East Nashville’s Tomato Fest with a feast—Breakfast Pizzette, Tuna Nicoise, Scored Flank Steak with Dijon Caper Sauce, and Grilled Watermelon. A multi-course grilling adventure with Southern flair!

programme.title: Serial Griller
programme.desc: Matt Moore kicks off Serial Griller with “Hot Handhelds,” grilling up bold favorites like Nashville Hot Chicken Sandwiches, Pork Gyros, char-grilled hot dogs, wings with blue cheese, and the juicy Hemingway Burger. No forks required!

programme.title: Serial Griller
programme.desc: Matt Moore hosts a laid-back dinner party in “Friends and Family,” joined by Thad Cockrell and friends. Enjoy grilled sausage, pork blade steaks with corn relish, redneck potatoes, and a Bardstown Buck cocktail—good food and great company!

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom learn the secrets behind the perfect traditional English roast dinner in London’s historic Borough Market, explore the best of the diverse food offerings in Brick Lane and pop in to see their friend, Sir Ian McKellen, in his pub in East London.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom traverse the Isles of Lewis and Harris, where they attend an agricultural show and are invited to a traditional Scottish cèilidh. They meet the Hebridean Baker who treats them to an alfresco dinner on the Isle of Taransay, and visit the Isle of Harris Distillery to try their offering of gin and whisky.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom share their favorite haunts in Los Angeles, including the famous Mel’s Diner in Santa Monica. They take a trip to Sonoma County for a farm-to-table adventure and get a rare opportunity to take a fascinating glimpse at the world’s most advanced lab-grown meat facility in Oakland.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom go on a Texas road trip, and absorb the very best of its Southern Hospitality. In Dallas they taste an array of delights offered at the State Fair of Texas. They learn about ranching and how to cook and eat like a real cowboy, and learn the secret behind Austin’s best BBQ.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom explore Kyushu, the most southerly of the Japanese main islands. They master the art of making the world famous Tonkotsu Ramen, fashion their own sushi knives with the help of a blacksmith who ordinarily has an eight-year waiting list for his product, and participate in a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Beautiful Costa Rica
